headline.purpose: Page titles (All Recipes, Units, Ingredient Categories).

title.purpose: Section labels inside forms and cards.

shadows.name: shadow-card
shadows.purpose: Resting state for recipe cards, stat tiles, active form panels.

shadows.name: shadow-card-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover lift for recipe cards; resting state for the recipe hero image.

shadows.name: shadow-card-lg
shadows.purpose: Modals, dropdowns, login card — anything floating above the full page.

motion.name: ease-out (strong)
motion.purpose: Default for entrances (pop-in, fade-in) — starts fast, feels responsive.

motion.name: stagger-step
motion.purpose: Per-card delay in recipe grid entrance, capped at 10 items.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action button (Save, Add, Create, Sign In).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #f97316; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; border: none; transition: background-color 150ms, transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #ea580c; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fb923c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Icon Button
components.description: Icon-only secondary action (edit, delete, favorite, back).
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost" aria-label="Delete"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 6h18M8 6V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2m3 0-1 14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2L4 6"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #9ca3af; padding: 8px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; transition: background-color 150ms, color 150ms, transform 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #dc2626; background: #fef2f2; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.9); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fb923c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; border: none; transition: background-color 150ms, transform 150ms; } .ds-chip:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-chip-active { background: #f97316; color: #ffffff; } .ds-chip-inactive { background: #f3f4f6; color: #6b7280; } .ds-chip-inactive:hover { background: #e5e7eb; }

components.name: Recipe Card
components.description: Clickable recipe tile in the grid — image, title, meta.
components.html:
Weeknight Pasta

30 min · 4 servings
components.css: .ds-card-recipe { display: block; background: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0 rgba(154,52,18,0.08), 0 1px 2px -1px rgba(154,52,18,0.06); transition: box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-card-recipe:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px -2px rgba(154,52,18,0.12), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(154,52,18,0.08); } .ds-card-recipe-img { width: 100%; height: 160px; background: #ffedd5; transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.23,1,0.32,1); } .ds-card-recipe:hover .ds-card-recipe-img { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-card-recipe-body { padding: 16px; } .ds-card-recipe-body h3 { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f2937; margin: 0; } .ds-card-recipe-body p { font-size: 12px; color: #9ca3af; margin: 4px 0 0; }

components.name: Flat List Row
components.description: Sequential list item (units, categories, category types) — border, no shadow.
components.css: .ds-list-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #f3f4f6; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; } .ds-list-row-tag { font-size: 12px; font-family: monospace; color: #6b7280; background: #f3f4f6; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input / select used across all forms.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 14px; background: #ffffff; color: #111827; transition: box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #fb923c; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Link
components.description: Dark sidebar navigation item, active vs inactive.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #d1d5db; transition: background-color 150ms, color 150ms, transform 150ms; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: #1f2937; color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-link:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-nav-link-active { background: #ea580c; color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Confirm Dialog
components.description: Shared destructive-action confirmation modal used app-wide.
components.html:
Delete Recipe

This cannot be undone.
components.css: .ds-dialog-backdrop { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); } .ds-dialog-panel { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 12px 32px -8px rgba(154,52,18,0.18), 0 4px 12px -4px rgba(154,52,18,0.1); padding: 24px; max-width: 384px; transform-origin: center; } .ds-btn-cancel { border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; background: transparent; color: #4b5563; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px; transition: background-color 150ms, transform 150ms; } .ds-btn-cancel:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-danger { background: #ef4444; color: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px; border: none; transition: background-color 150ms, transform 150ms; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: #dc2626; } .ds-btn-danger:active { transform: scale(0.97); }

components.name: Toast
components.description: Bottom-right transient notification, dark pill, slide in/out.
components.css: .ds-toast { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; background: #111827; color: #ffffff; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); min-width: 240px; }

narrative.overview:
This is the digital version of the index-card box on the kitchen counter: a little worn at the edges of use, never at the edges of trust. Every screen exists to answer one question fast — "what am I cooking, and what do I need" — so the design favors quiet legibility over decoration. One accent color (toasted orange) carries warmth; everything else is restrained charcoal-on-paper so the recipe content, not the chrome, is the thing you look at.

It explicitly rejects generic SaaS dashboard density (data tables, KPI tiles, sidebar-heavy chrome dressed up as a "tool"), recipe-blog clutter (ads, preambles, popups between you and the ingredient list), and playful/gamified consumer-app styling (badges, confetti, mascots) — this is a daily-use household object, not a marketing surface.
keyCharacteristics: One accent (toasted orange), used deliberately and sparingly — never as a background wash.
Flat list rows for sequential data; elevation reserved for things that are genuinely a card.
Warm-tinted shadows (burnt-orange rgba, not flat black) so elevation reads as part of the same palette.
One destructive-confirmation pattern, one motion vocabulary, reused everywhere rather than invented per screen.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Toasted Orange is the only saturated brand color on any screen. Status colors are functional, not decorative, and never substitute for the primary accent on a CTA.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Outfit covers every role via weight, never a second typeface.

rules.name: The Earned Elevation Rule
rules.body: A shadow only appears where something is genuinely a card. Sequential rows get a hairline border instead — never both on the same flat row.

dos: Do keep Toasted Orange (#f97316) as the only saturated accent on any screen.
Do use a hairline border on flat sequential list rows instead of a shadow.
Do tint shadows toward burnt-orange rather than flat black, on every card/modal/dropdown.
Do give every pressable element active:scale feedback — no exceptions.
Do reuse the single shared Confirm Dialog component for any destructive action.
donts: Don't introduce generic SaaS dashboard density — data tables, KPI stat tiles, sidebar-heavy admin chrome.
Don't add recipe-blog clutter — ads, preambles, popups.
Don't add playful/gamified styling — badges, confetti, mascots, novelty icons.
Don't pair a border and a shadow on the same flat list row.
Don't use scale(0) as an entrance animation starting point.
Don't use window.confirm() / window.alert() for any in-app confirmation or error.
